tagline: Keep the toolkit up to date.
longDescription:
Fetches the latest YouCoded toolkit release from GitHub and installs it in place — bumps the `VERSION` file, pulls new skills/hooks/commands, runs migrations, reconciles your settings.json hooks against the new manifest, and reports exactly what changed. Run it whenever you remember (no auto-update; you're in control), or when `/health` warns that you're behind.

Safe to re-run; idempotent by design. Verifies the working tree is clean before touching anything, never overwrites local edits, and tells you exactly which commands to run if it can't auto-resolve a conflict. Offline-safe: gracefully tells you it can't check when there's no network rather than failing partway through.
